testcase.name: user_cannot_delete_payment
testcase.error: java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException: Not supported yet. at Reiudemo.demo.PaymentServiceTest.delete(PaymentServiceTest.java:109) at Reiudemo.demo.PaymentServiceTest.user_cannot_delete_payment(PaymentServiceTest.java:104)
